AutoPacker.dev
Home Services Downloads Blog

Packaging shouldn't be the bottleneck.

Every failed software deployment is a drain on resources. Whether migrating to the cloud, managing legacy infrastructure, or simply keeping pace with updates, poorly packaged applications create a cascade of helpdesk tickets, frustrate users, and halt productivity. We are your dedicated remote packaging partner, embedding with your team to deliver zero-touch, reliable, and silently installed applications that just work.

Intune & Modern Workplace

Full adoption of the cloud model. We specialize in `.intunewin` preparation, rigorous testing on Windows 10/11, Autopilot application deployments, and proactive management to ensure your cloud-first delivery is seamless and secure.

SCCM / MECM Mastery

Go beyond simple deployments with end-to-end application lifecycle management. We handle complex task sequences, dependency chains, supersedence, and phased, risk-mitigated rollouts to ensure stability across your entire on-premise or co-managed estate.

Advanced Repackaging

True expertise in MSI, MSIX, and App-V using industry-standard tools like InstallShield and Master Packager. We craft robust, silent installations with complex PowerShell wrappers, custom actions, and transforms to handle even the most stubborn legacy applications.

Apple Enterprise & Jamf

Bring the same level of enterprise control to your Mac fleet. Deep Jamf Pro and Jamf Composer expertise for custom PKG/DMG repackaging, pre/post-install scripting, and zero-touch Mac provisioning via advanced bash/zsh automation.

Why Us?

Experience meets Methodology

With over 15 years dedicated exclusively to application packaging and enterprise deployments, we've seen every edge case and handled every complex vendor installer. We don't just deliver a package; we deliver a partnership focused on long-term reliability and a streamlined management experience for your IT team.

01

The Handoff

Provide the source media, licensing details, and clear deployment requirements. We'll establish a discovery call to confirm the scope, understand dependencies, and define success criteria for UAT.

02

The Build

Your application is expertly repackaged, virtualized, or scripted for a silent, zero-touch installation. All work is performed in an isolated lab environment, adhering to best practices for clean and resilient packages.

03

The Delivery

You receive a thoroughly tested MSI, MSIX, .intunewin, or PKG, delivered with comprehensive documentation covering installation commands, detection methods, and any custom configurations for immediate deployment.

Ready to clear your packaging backlog?

Let's Talk Deployment

>_ Hosted on Azure. Provisioned with Terraform.
